title: Logical error: Sort order of blocks violated for column with floating-points
description:
### Describe the bug
Not related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/80734. Seems related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/80803 instead. Maybe it's a missing corner case @GrigoryPervakov ?
### How to reproduce
On a debug build run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int, c1 Float32) ENGINE = SummingMergeTree() ORDER BY (gccMurmurHash(c1));
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c0) SELECT 2, CAST(number AS Int) FROM numbers(52);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c0) SELECT c1, c0 FROM generateRandom('c1 Float32, c0 Int', 4471575971265722, 3161, 5) LIMIT 142;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c0) SELECT c1, c0 FROM generateRandom('c1 Float32, c0 Int', 14156128262908154975, 2463, 2) LIMIT 453;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c1) SELECT 1, 3 FROM numbers(68);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c0) SELECT c1, c0 FROM generateRandom('c1 Float32, c0 Int', 17031888711050628234, 4920, 10) LIMIT 239;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c1) SELECT 1, CAST(number AS Float32) FROM numbers(83);
SELECT * FROM t0 FINAL;  --Logical error on merge
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Sort order of blocks violated for column number 1, left: UInt64_12492982102402348482, right: UInt64_5067173032167480177. Chunk 0, rows read 554.'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000027700eb2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014a20c69
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d31630e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d315d11
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<unsigned long&, String, String, unsigned long&, unsigned long&, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<unsigned long&>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<unsigned long&>::type, std::type_identity<unsigned long&>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, unsigned long&, String&&, String&&, unsigned long&, unsigned long&, String&&) @ 0x000000001fa22384
5. src/Processors/Transforms/CheckSortedTransform.cpp:45: DB::CheckSortedTransform::transform(DB::Chunk&)::$_0::operator()(std::vector<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>, std::allocator<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>>> const&, unsigned long, std::vector<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>, std::allocator<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>>> const&, unsigned long) const @ 0x000000001fa22061
6. src/Processors/Transforms/CheckSortedTransform.cpp:73: DB::CheckSortedTransform::transform(DB::Chunk&) @ 0x000000001fa21bbc
7. src/Processors/ISimpleTransform.h:33: DB::ISimpleTransform::transform(DB::Chunk&, DB::Chunk&) @ 0x000000001831dd93
8. src/Processors/ISimpleTransform.cpp:98: DB::ISimpleTransform::work() @ 0x000000001f776eca
9. src/Processors/Executors/ExecutionThreadContext.cpp:53: DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask() @ 0x000000001f796510
10. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:351: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStepImpl(unsigned long, DB::IAcquiredSlot*, std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f788298
11. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:179: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStep(std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f787e4e
12. src/Processors/Executors/PullingPipelineExecutor.cpp:59: DB::PullingPipelineExecutor::pull(DB::Chunk&) @ 0x000000001f79f574
13. src/Processors/Executors/PullingPipelineExecutor.cpp:70: DB::PullingPipelineExecutor::pull(DB::Block&) @ 0x000000001f79f703
14. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1007: DB::MergeTask::ExecuteAndFinalizeHorizontalPart::executeImpl() const @ 0x000000001eeee0b0
15. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:826: DB::MergeTask::ExecuteAndFinalizeHorizontalPart::execute() @ 0x000000001eeece19
16. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1658: DB::MergeTask::execute() @ 0x000000001eef3bb6
17. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergePlainMergeTreeTask.cpp:58: DB::MergePlainMergeTreeTask::executeStep() @ 0x000000001ef61cce
18. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor.cpp:305: DB::MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor<DB::DynamicRuntimeQueue>::routine(std::shared_ptr<DB::TaskRuntimeData>) @ 0x000000001ef20c35
19. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor.cpp:369: DB::MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor<DB::DynamicRuntimeQueue>::threadFunction() @ 0x000000001ef21742
20. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000014b63f53
21. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x0000000014b6a626
22. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000014b613e6
23. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se190107]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x0000000014b67e00
24. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
25. __clone3 @ 0x0000000000133b5
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, value FLOAT8, name TEXT);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value, name) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'A'), (2, NULL, 'B'), (3, 3.5, 'C');
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT, score FLOAT4);
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, score) SELECT id, value::FLOAT4 FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ref_id, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM t2 GROUP BY ref_id HAVING avg_score > 2.0;
key_bug_features: Sort order violation for floating-point column in merge
